recap: Renamed kitty-run-claude to kitty-helper-claude-start, added optional prompt arg passed directly to claude, updated kitty-window-toggle-claude reference.
Added --cmd flag to kitty-tab-create; defaults to zsh; uses ${=kittyCommand} for word-splitting like kitty-window-create.
Added baseline bats tests for sidequest-end covering no-arg error, missing-file error, and happy-path clipboard-write call.

Created sidequest orchestrator script: calls git-worktree-create, derives worktree path from OROSHI_WORKTREES_DIR + git-github-project-name, opens kitty tab with kitty-helper-claude-start (with optional prompt), focused by default.
Replaced clipboard-write logic with a call to sidequest <slug> --prompt @<filepath> --no-focus; slug extracted from basename.
